decks.title: Architect Meeting Playbook
decks.description: Core framework for framing architecture discussions. Covers 6 problem domains with structured ask/default/say/avoid patterns.

decks.title: Domain Cheatsheet
decks.description: Quick reference for Azure HR/payroll/talent platform decisions across payroll, absence, onboarding, benefits, identity, and reporting.

decks.title: Meeting Response Pack
decks.description: Ready-made responses for common meeting scenarios including the 4-step pattern, situation-specific responses, and time-buying lines.

decks.title: Objection Handlers
decks.description: Responses to meeting clichés: single pane of glass, golden source, everything real-time, AI, Kubernetes, shared platform.

decks.title: Architecture Overreach
decks.description: Counters for architecture overreach: event sourcing, canonical models, one workflow engine, premature standardisation, and future-proofing.

scenarios.title: Platform Consolidation Meeting
scenarios.description: Navigate a VP-led meeting about consolidating five regional payroll engines into one platform. Handle scope creep, stakeholder translation, and architecture overreach.

scenarios.title: The Golden Source Debate
scenarios.description: Counter the push for a canonical data model across 14 systems. Separate operational consistency from reporting needs and establish domain ownership.

scenarios.title: The Real-Time Everything Request
scenarios.description: Decompose a sweeping 'make everything real-time' demand into right-sized solutions. Handle Kafka hype, competitive anxiety, and UX vs infrastructure confusion.
